info.english_meaning: to cut to break to slice
info.hindI_arTa: Ceda karanA kataranA cIranA wukaq0e wukaq0e karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: brAhmaRasya havirDvANkzEH pralupyate apahriyata ityarTaH DvANkzA vilumpantIti pAWAntaram
'te devA asurAn pratidfSya samullupya' (Sa0 brA0 95121) samullupya=antarDAya
'anyonyasyAvalumpanti sArameyA yaTAmizam rAjanyA BarataSrezWa BoktukAmA vasunDarAm' (BA0 BIzma0 973).. avalumpanti=apacCindanti AcCindanti
'rakzAMsi hi bilumpanti SrAdDamArakzavarjitam' (manu0 3204) vilumpanti AmfSanti AcCindanti kAmakroDO SarIrasTO prajYAnaM tO vilumpataH kfntataH utsAdayataH vinASayataH
'uBayorhastayormuktaM yadannamupanIyate tadvipralumpantyasurAH sahasA duzwacetasaH' (manu0 3225).. vipralumpanti AcCindanti
